author: pi-adversarial-review

patch.value: Adversarial diff review of pm-gantt-chart. Findings: (1) BLOCKER FIXED: release.yml paths array included dist which exits 1 under set -euo pipefail when dist is gitignored — removed dist from paths. (2) INFO: SVG width expansion for long timelines, TODAY marker z-order fix, progress label dedup, EXPORT_FORMATS exported. (3) LOW: manifest uses pm.compatibility v2 schema without version-specific compatibility.pm field (pre-existing, not introduced by diff). All checks pass: typecheck, build, 77 tests, audit 0 vulns, pack:dry-run, changelog:check.
All diffs reviewed; release workflow dist reference fixed; release:check suite passes.
BLOCKER fixed: removed dist from release.yml paths array. All checks green.

message: BLOCKER fixed: removed dist from release.yml paths array. All checks green.
